title: Lambda Cold Start Timeout
fixes: Enable provisioned concurrency
Reduce deployment package size
Use Lambda SnapStart for Java runtimes

title: Lambda Function Timeout

Optimize function code to reduce execution time
Use Step Functions for long-running workflows

title: API Gateway Integration Timeout

Implement async pattern with SQS
Add caching with API Gateway stage cache

title: DynamoDB Throughput Exceeded
fixes: Enable auto-scaling on the table

Implement exponential backoff in client code

title: S3 Access Denied
fixes: Check bucket policy allows the IAM role
Verify object ACL permissions
Ensure KMS key policy grants decrypt access

title: CloudFormation Stack Rollback

Use change sets to preview before deploying

title: ECS Essential Container Failure

Verify health check configuration
Ensure sufficient memory/CPU allocation

title: RDS Connection Failure

title: SQS Visibility Timeout Expired

Call ChangeMessageVisibility for long-running tasks

title: SNS Delivery Failure - Endpoint Disabled

regex: is not authorized to perform.*because no identity-based policy

title: Lambda Runtime Exit Error

title: API Gateway Rate Limit Exceeded

title: DynamoDB Conditional Check Failed
fixes: Review condition expression logic

regex: NoSuchKey.*The specified key does not exist

title: CloudFormation Resource Creation Failed

title: ECS Cannot Pull Container Image

title: RDS Max Connections Exceeded

title: SQS Invalid Message Body

title: IAM Access Denied Exception

title: Azure Function Timeout

title: Cosmos DB Request Rate Too Large

Optimize queries to consume fewer RUs

title: Azure Blob Storage SAS Token Expired

title: Azure Key Vault Access Denied

title: Cosmos DB Service Busy

title: Azure App Service Package Deploy Error

title: Azure Function Host Not Running

regex: AuthorizationFailed.*does not have authorization to perform

title: Cosmos DB Offer Exceeded

regex: BlobNotFound|The specified blob does not exist

title: Azure Key Vault Secret Not Found

title: Azure Function Out of Memory

title: Cosmos DB Partition Key Error

regex: SAS token does not allow access to this resource

title: Cosmos DB Document Too Large

title: Firebase Quota Exceeded

regex: The query requires an index.*create it here

regex: Function execution took \d+ ms, finished with status: 'timeout'

title: CLS Too High

title: Memory Leak Detected

regex: Image.*not properly sized|Serve images in next-gen formats

title: ESLint Globals in Flat Config
fixes: Replace env with globals from globals package
Import globals and spread browser/node sets
Define globals directly in languageOptions

regex: No package found.*workspace|Package.*not found in workspace
title: Workspace Package Not Found
fixes: Verify package name matches workspace definition
Check workspaces field in root package.json
Ensure package directory exists and has package.json

title: Task Dependency Cycle Detected
fixes: Review dependsOn configuration in turbo.json
Remove circular task references between packages
Use topological ordering for task execution

title: Turborepo Cache Miss
fixes: Check inputs configuration in turbo.json
Verify environment variables are in globalEnv
Ensure .gitignore is not excluding hash inputs

title: Root Dependency Conflict
fixes: Use resolutions/overrides to force single version
Move shared dependency to root package.json
Use syncpack to align versions across packages

title: Publish Order Violation
fixes: Publish dependencies before dependents
Use changesets for ordered publishing
Configure topological publishing in CI pipeline

title: Changesets Error
fixes: Run changeset add to create a changeset
Check .changeset directory exists and is valid
Verify changeset config.json access field

title: Turborepo Daemon Error
fixes: Restart daemon with turbo daemon clean
Kill stale turbo processes
Update turborepo to latest version

title: Workspace Protocol Resolution Error
fixes: Use workspace:* protocol in package.json
Ensure package manager supports workspace protocol
Run install from monorepo root

title: Nx Project Not Found
fixes: Run nx reset to clear project graph cache
Verify project.json or package.json has nx config
Check workspace.json or nx.json includes path

title: Turborepo Config Migration Error
fixes: Migrate pipeline to tasks in turbo.json
Update globalDependencies to globalEnv format
Follow turbo codemods for version migration

title: Lerna Topological Build Failure
fixes: Ensure all dependencies build successfully first
Use --stream flag to see which package fails
Check for missing build script in dependency

title: Turborepo Remote Cache Auth Failed
fixes: Verify TURBO_TOKEN environment variable
Re-login with turbo login
Check remote cache endpoint configuration

title: Nx Affected Detection Issue
fixes: Verify base and head refs are correct
Check that changes touch files owned by projects
Run nx graph to verify project dependencies

title: Workspace Hoisting Conflict
fixes: Add nohoist pattern for conflicting package
Use pnpm for stricter dependency isolation
Configure workspace-specific node_modules

title: Turborepo Missing Task Outputs
fixes: Configure outputs array in turbo.json task
Verify build outputs match configured paths
Add dist/** or build/** to outputs

title: Changesets Prerelease Mode Error
fixes: Run changeset pre exit to leave prerelease mode
Check .changeset/pre.json is valid
Remove stale pre.json and re-enter pre mode

title: Internal Package Resolution Error
fixes: Configure TypeScript paths in tsconfig.json
Use exports field in internal package.json
Set main/types fields correctly in package

title: Turborepo Environment Variable Not Hashed
fixes: Add variable to globalEnv in turbo.json
Use env array on specific task for scoped vars
Prefix with TURBO_ for automatic inclusion

title: Workspace Version Mismatch
fixes: Run syncpack fix-mismatches to align versions
Set versionGroups in syncpack config
Use single-version policy for shared deps

title: Nx Generator/Schematic Error
fixes: Check generator version matches Nx version
Verify required options are provided
Run with --dry-run to preview changes first
